text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for worrying you, Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for worrying you, Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But this injury is nothing. I can still train!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really, I'm fine. Well, then... shall we?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But an injury like this is nothing to me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really?! I see... I'm sorry. I didn't know.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I understand. I'll hold off on training until I'm healed... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually persuaded by my reasoning, Rice
Shower rests for a while afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! I'll be careful!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! I'll be careful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're about to head back to training—

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think training hours are already finished
today.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
They said they had to do maintenance on
something, so the open hours for today are
shorter.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... I got your hopes up for nothing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... I got your hopes up for nothing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to cheer Rice Shower up, but she stays
depressed for a while.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll prove that this injury isn't anything you should
worry about!
choice_data_list: You just focus on getting better first.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll prove that this injury isn't anything you should
worry about!
choice_data_list: You just focus on getting better first.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-right... But I... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Okay. But once I'm healed, I'm going to work my
butt off!
